titleStmt.title: SII 39.261: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 261. (A.R. No. 261 of 1916.) SRIMUSHNAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. BHŪVARAGAHAVA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE EAST WALL OF THE SAME PRĀKĀRA VENKATAPATIRĀYA, SUBHANU (1643 A.D. ?).

summary.p: This inscription narates that a certain Virisaḍaiyarāmaṇ performed severe penance for 18 months and obtained the conch, discuss and bow from the god Adivarāgar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ śrī Ātivārakar cupāṇu varuṣam cittirai mātam viricaṭai rāmaṉ va ppi rāmaṉ
ṉitu tiṟtamalaic cīrmai periya kurukula cāliṉāyakkar pāḷaiyam veṅ
kaṭa patirāyar cīmaiyātipati yāḷukira kālam nallā Ayyaṉukkuk kiṣṇaṉ vi
ra caṭairāmaṉ tavam paṇṇippoṉatu caṉikkiḻamai ṉāṉ A ti mu
�l poṉār poṉatum kāṭepoṉār potum cuṇaiteṭap poṉār
viṉaiyum mutaṭaiyum cāppiṭṭu yiruntār paṭukkai yillāmal nittiraiyillā
mal patiṉeṭṭu mātam yiruntār viricaṭai rāmaṉ tavam pa ṉa
ṭa vantārkaḷ viricaṭai rāmaṉ tampi koṉeri koṇṭal paṭai
Anta viceṣam keṭṭaār viricaṭai rāmaṉ
Appaṉ tiruppati keruṭa kampattaṇṭaiyile viricaṭaiyaṉ
koṇṭu Eḻu vaṭṭaikku keṭṭār kuṭāte yiruntāl tiykkukeṭṭār kuṭāteyiruntāl tiykkuḷḷe viḻuntu
maṭiveṇ Eṉṉār Aṭṭum ṉārāyaṇa cuvāmiyum varattai kuṭuttār caṅkucakkara
mum kuṭuttār vamikka Ampu kuṭuttār viricaṭai ṉa kāveriyile piriyi Eṉṉār A
p poye kṣapaṇarum raṅkatāmaṟum varu ppiṭṭār tiṭukkana Eḻuntu yi
runtār viricaṭai rāmaṉ takappaṉ koṉeri tāyi liyār viricaṭairāmaṉ
ṇṭai yiruntavarkaḷaik vār tevakaṉmikaḷukkum
ppa koḷ makaḷ tiru Urittaṅkai veṉṟu mālai koṉ viṭṭa
tevapiyāḷ ciṉṉi veḷḷai veṭicci petti veḷḷaicccinṉi vāḻvi
ṉācciyār veṭipaccai paṇṇikkoṉ Uttamapiḷḷai keṅkaiya
ppaṉ virapaccaiyappaṉ kumpāḷ lakṣimi ceṭṭi koṉpiḷḷai
ṉikkaṉ Appaṉāyakkaṉ mañcaappaṉ pommaṉāyakkar vaiyya Appaṉa
maiccuṉa muttiṉāyakkaṉ timmaṉāyakkaṉ Arumpa kavuṇṭāṉai
paccaikoram māṉavaṉ tāya ppakavaṇpaṉ poṉkiri tāṉ
Digital edition of SII 39.261 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
